name: coastline-condos
description: Coastline Condos marketing site (static). Optional local tools only — no build required to deploy.

scripts.css: tailwindcss -c tools/tailwind.config.js -i tools/input.css -o css/tailwind.css --minify && node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.writeFileSync('css/_b.css',fs.readFileSync('css/tailwind.css')+fs.readFileSync('css/styles.css'));" && esbuild css/_b.css --minify --outfile=css/site.min.css && node -e "require('fs').unlinkSync('css/_b.css')"
scripts.js: node -e "const{execSync}=require('child_process');const fs=require('fs');fs.mkdirSync('js/min',{recursive:true});for (const f of ['preview-gate','inventory','i18n-extra','main','floorplan','effects','experience','building3d']) execSync('npx esbuild js/'+f+'.js --minify --outfile=js/min/'+f+'.js',{stdio:'inherit'});"
scripts.optimize: npm run css && npm run js && npm run images
